PowerShell(Write-Host "=== Files changed locally \(uncommitted\) ==="; git status --short; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Remote-only files that overlap with local changes ==="; $local = \(git status --short | ForEach-Object { \($_ -replace '^..\\s+',''\).Trim\(\) }\); $remote = \(git diff --name-only main origin/main\); $overlap = $local | Where-Object { $remote -contains $_ }; if \($overlap\) { $overlap } else { Write-Host "\(none — no direct file conflicts\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== wingstop spec: is local version identical to remote? ==="; $localHash = \(Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 'docs/wingstop_audit_tool_spec.md'\).Hash; $remoteHash = \(git show origin/main:docs/wingstop_audit_tool_spec.md | Out-String | ForEach-Object { [System.BitConverter]::ToString\(\(New-Object System.Security.Cryptography.SHA256Managed\).ComputeHash\([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($_\)\)\) -replace '-','' }\); Write-Host "Local:  $localHash"; Write-Host "Remote: $remoteHash"; if \($localHash -eq $remoteHash\) { Write-Host "IDENTICAL" } else { Write-Host "DIFFERENT \(will conflict\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== wingstop spec: local vs remote size ==="; \(Get-Item 'docs/wingstop_audit_tool_spec.md'\).Length; git show origin/main:docs/wingstop_audit_tool_spec.md | Measure-Object -Character | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Characters)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== claude.md remote changes \(summary\) ==="; git log origin/main ^main -- claude.md --oneline; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== claude.md: lines added/removed on remote vs local HEAD ==="; git diff main origin/main -- claude.md --stat)
PowerShell(git diff HEAD -- claude.md --stat; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Local-only changes to claude.md \(vs HEAD\) ==="; git diff HEAD -- claude.md | Select-Object -First 200)
PowerShell(git show origin/main:claude.md | Out-File -FilePath 'claude.md' -Encoding utf8 -NoNewline; Write-Host "Remote claude.md written to working tree. Size:"; \(Get-Item 'claude.md'\).Length)

PowerShell($content = git show origin/main:claude.md | Out-String; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\(Resolve-Path 'claude.md'\), $content, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); Write-Host "Bytes:"; \(Get-Item 'claude.md'\).Length; Write-Host "Line count:"; \(Get-Content 'claude.md'\).Count)

PowerShell(Remove-Item 'docs/wingstop_audit_tool_spec.md' -Force; Write-Host "Local wingstop spec deleted."; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Verification: merged claude.md line count & key headings ==="; $lines = \(Get-Content 'claude.md'\).Count; Write-Host "Total lines: $lines"; Write-Host ""; git diff origin/main -- claude.md --stat; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== Final git status ==="; git status --short)
